prompt:
Fine-tune codellama/CodeLlama-7b-Instruct-hf on a code-repair dataset. Each row at ./data/repairs.jsonl has 'buggy' and 'fixed' Python snippets. Format as 'BUG:
{buggy}

FIX:
{fixed}'. LoRA rank 16 alpha 32, applied to all-linear modules. SFTTrainer, 1 epoch, batch size 1, gradient accumulation 8, lr 1e-4, bf16. Save to ./out/codellama-repair.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'codellama/CodeLlama-7b-Instruct-hf'
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id, torch_dtype='bfloat16')

ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='./data/repairs.jsonl', split='train')
ds = ds.map(lambda r: {'text': f"BUG:\n{r['buggy']}\n\nFIX:\n{r['fixed']}"})

lora = LoraConfig(r=16, lora_alpha=32, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules='all-linear',
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/codellama-repair',
                 per_device_train_batch_size=1,
                 gradient_accumulation_steps=8, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=1e-4, bf16=True, save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/codellama-repair')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/codellama-repair')
